expectations.text: Report names at least 3 specific files, not just layer-level guidance
expectations.evidence: Names StatisticsService.cs, AgentCallStatsQueries.cs, TestRunsController.cs in top-3 prioritized list

expectations.text: Includes a numeric overall coverage percentage

expectations.evidence: Per-layer table shows all 8 Trsr.* projects with line+branch %

expectations.text: Top recommendations cite a concrete signal (churn / complexity / untested public API / coverage %)
expectations.evidence: '24 commits in last 90 days and 0% coverage', 'complexity 71 with zero tests', '16 public members'

expectations.text: Closes with a clear next step (offer to draft tests for a specific file)
expectations.evidence: Offers to draft StatisticsServiceTests extending BaseTest<Module>

expectations.text: Does not write any artifact files into the repo
expectations.evidence: Only output is the saved report.md in workspace; no coverage-report.md created
